steps.title: Use the colon clue
steps.content: The words after the colon explain the blank: the delta is constantly evolving, and its channels and strips of land change in size and shape. The missing word must describe ongoing change.

steps.title: Match the changing delta
steps.content: A means unchanging, the opposite of the passage. B means able to be maintained, and C means without equal; neither describes constant evolution. The answer is D.
